description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City is carrying out emergency economic measures using national government funding for priority support in response to rising prices and regional revitalization.

As energy and food prices continue to rise, we are implementing the 12th round of Hanno City Emergency Economic Measures to support residents and businesses affected by inflation and other economic challenges. The funding comes from the national Price Surge Response Priority Support Regional Revitalization Temporary Grant.

For details on each initiative, please see the PDF file below:

12th Hanno City Emergency Economic Measures List (PDF file: 121.4 KB)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/sangyoshinkoka/13330.html
summary: ℹ️ 12th Hanno City Emergency Economic Measures
